title: Canonical agent profile
description: Target contract for .agents/agents/<id>/profile.md frontmatter. DEFINITION ONLY — not enforced in PR B. Existing profiles are not migrated by this schema. The system prompt is target-canonical as a fenced ```text block in the profile.md body (NOT a separate file); Avatar/agents/System_Prompt_Agent_*.md is a later dedup/migration concern, not PR B.

id.description: Lowercase-hyphen id; must equal the agent directory name.

status.description: Lifecycle status. 'draft' = udkast (den faktisk anvendte mellemstatus for Banedanmark-rolleagenter; tilføjet 2026-07-10 så skemaet matcher realiteten). FORELOEBIG = placeholder/provisional (Danish 'FORELØBIG'); spelled ASCII here for tooling-safety.

source.description: Provenance string, e.g. 'Iqra-main/lib/agents/src/index.ts (X_SYSTEM_PROMPT)' or 'Agent-harness / Banedanmark domain knowledge'.

avatar.description: Relative path to avatar image, or null if avatarless (avatarless candidates belong in archive-entry.schema.json).

primary_models.description: Preferred model runtimes (e.g. Codex, Kimi, Qwen Code, Gemini Code).

skills.description: Skill ids. TARGET-CANONICAL location for skills (single source). skills.yaml is target-deprecated/generated — folding it in is a later migration, not PR B.

capabilities.description: Free-form capability tags. Target-canonical location is this profile frontmatter (currently also duplicated in skills.yaml + runtime registry).

runtime_targets.description: Adapter ids this agent renders to (see runtime-adapter.schema.json). Planned; not populated in PR B.

provenance.description: Structured provenance (supersedes the flat source string over time).

open_decisions.description: Known unresolved questions for this agent.

$comment: Body contract (not expressible in JSON Schema): profile.md MUST contain the system prompt in a fenced ```text block under a '## System Prompt' heading. This is the single canonical prompt source; the Avatar/agents/System_Prompt_Agent_*.md duplicate is slated for later dedup. Role-vs-persona agent model and system-prompt placement are OPEN DECISIONS — see docs/architecture/registry-reconciliation.md.
